tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_pipeline_execution
tests.trace:
def test_pipeline_execution():
        """Run the bytewax pipeline and check for success."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["python", "-m", "bytewax.run", "pipeline:flow", "-r", "./recovery_dir"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 0, f"Pipeline execution failed. stdout: {result.stdout}\nstderr: {result.stderr}"
E       AssertionError: Pipeline execution failed. stdout: 
E         stderr: usage: python -m bytewax.run [-h] [-r RECOVERY_DIRECTORY]
E                                      [-s SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL] [-b BACKUP_INTERVAL]
E                                      [-w WORKERS_PER_PROCESS] [-i PROCESS_ID]
E                                      [-a ADDRESSES]
E                                      import_str
E         python -m bytewax.run: error: when running with recovery, the `-s/--snapshot_interval` and `-b/--backup_interval` values must be set. For more information about setting these values, please see https://bytewax.io/docs/concepts/recovery.
E         
E       assert 2 == 0
E        +  where 2 = CompletedProcess(args=['python', '-m', 'bytewax.run', 'pipeline:flow', '-r', './recovery_dir'], returncode=2, stdout='...must be set. For more information about setting these values, please see https://bytewax.io/docs/concepts/recovery.\n').returncode
